summary: Cycle E (5th overnight-triage fire of UTC 2026-05-23, ~57min after cycle D) ran heartbeat-only. Both queues absent on disk for 26th consecutive cycle. regen-all clean: ALL CHECKS PASSED, round-trip 0 failures (23s elapsed at 04:01:54Z). Tree at cycle E open had M src/core/router-sharecard.js (Founder W2.S3 share-actions WIP); left alone per isolation discipline. METRIC-INTEGRITY CONTINUATION HEADLINE: A12_operational dropped FURTHER cycle D->E (75 yellow -> 60 yellow; overall_score 87.8 -> 87.1, -0.7). Intermediate regen-app-health at 03:58:59Z inside D->E window showed 7/10 skip-dirty; cycle E open 04:01:35Z showed 6/10 (one event rolled out). This is NOT a new carry-over item — A12 was restored at cycle D with explicit lesson that rolling-window scores oscillate; cycle E records continued evidence sustaining that lesson. Founder ship-sprint heavy in C->E window: 22 commits at cycle E open + 2 more landed DURING cycle E (cf257035 feat(W2.S3): 3 share actions on round share card absorbed the router-sharecard.js WIP cycle E had identified — handler functions WERE implemented, contrary to cycle E's initial diagnosis; c88cd8ee cron post-commit absorbed cycle E's own docs/reports/app-health.html regen output cleanly). Total D->E window now 11 substantive + 14 routine cron = 25 commits in ~60min. Cycle E's commit excludes new Founder WIP at close: M src/pages/partygames.js + ?? iter43/ design-pass directory. Metric-integrity attestation: HONEST — A12 continuation as sustained evidence not novelty; commit-race absorbed benignly documented; cycle E's wrong-diagnosis of router-sharecard.js (WIP vs shipped) explicitly corrected in the journal. 6 carry-over Founder action items preserved from cycle D close (no restoration, no drop): A8 lighthouse, main-flows user-context capture stale (~8.08d, drift), quota-status weekly_cap null, FIQ D40 parity GATE-FAIL, cron cadence (10th consecutive flag), A12_operational sustained yellow.
founder_action_items: Cron cadence - now 26 consecutive empty-inbox fires (22 of 2026-05-22 + cycles A+B+C+D+E of 2026-05-23). Suggested remedy unchanged from cycles R->D: add guard at Step 0 of overnight-triage prompt - exit clean if no motion in task-queue/founder/, escalations/inbox/, or bug-reports/inbox/ in last 3h AND regen-all last-pass < 60 min old. Would reduce nightly fires from ~26 to ~6-8 while preserving real heartbeat coverage. **Founder decision required (10th consecutive cycle flagging this).**

A8_performance: dimension score 80 green at cycle E, but underlying Lighthouse 65/100 on 1 page (target 75+) - open .lighthouseci/*.html, fix top failures (carry-over from cycles S+T+U+A+B+C+D; dimension score holds due to rolling-window mechanics but page-level fix still pending).

main-flows.html user-context capture ~8.08 days stale (was 8.04 at cycle D) - run `node scripts/visual-audit/founder-context-capture.mjs` before next ship-close (natural drift, not blocking; same diagnosis as cycles S->D).
quota-status weekly_cap field still null - no % computation possible (preserved Founder-triage item from cycles R->D; sidecar discipline OK per [quota-status-schema] check).

aggregate-fiq-status D40 parity GATE-FAIL - stale-timestamp >24h hard threshold tripped because FIQ has had zero churn across 26 consecutive empty-inbox cycles (~26h+ elapsed). NOT an aggregator bug (status=green declared=26 deployed=26 ran cleanly; idempotent-write correctly skipped unchanged content). Gate firing as designed per scripts/aggregate-self-tests.py:138-141. Remedies all cross Founder-decision boundary: (1) add last_polled_at heartbeat field to decouple poll-staleness from content-staleness, (2) raise 24h threshold to 48-72h, (3) refine D40 parity to distinguish idempotent-skip-grace from aggregator-failed-and-stale, (4) accept the GATE-FAIL as a faithful signal and surface it on dashboard. First flagged 2026-05-23 cycle B post-commit. Will trip on every cycle until FIQ activity resumes or remedy lands.

A12_operational SUSTAINED YELLOW with continued oscillation: dimension 60 yellow at cycle E (6/10 skip-dirty, with intermediate 03:58:59Z run showing 7/10 inside the D->E window) vs cycle D's 75 yellow (6/10) vs cycle C's 100 green (2/10) vs cycle B's 60 yellow (10/10). 4 distinct rolling-window values in 4 cycles. Cycle D's restoration + lesson stands: 'observed-improved' / 'observed-regressed' is honest framing, not 'RESOLVED.' Cycle E records this as sustained evidence for that lesson, NOT as a new finding. Same remedy as cycle D: check .husky/post-commit doesn't dirty tree mid-run + verify routinePatterns allowlist covers all auto-generated outputs.
